name: Peanut Butter Crunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the cake mix, brown sugar, and peanut butter at low speed until crumbly.
4. Set aside half of the peanut butter mixture.
5. To the remaining mixture, add water, oil, and eggs. Blend at low speed until mostened.
6. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
7. Stir in 1/4 cup of chocolate chips and 1/4 cup of peanut butter chips into the batter.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. In a small bowl, combine the reserved half of the peanut butter mixture, remaining chocolate chips, and peanuts.
10. Sprinkle over the batter.
11. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Immediately sprinkle with the remaining peanut butter chips; gently press into the top of the cake.
Exchanges: 3 starch, 4 fat.
